soilRegime.title: CRUS Portugal Continental · Vila Nova de Gaia
soilRegime.note: Official DGT soil-regime layer used for urban/rustic designation because DGT Cadastro Predial exposes no Gaia parcel records through the public OGC API as of this cache build.

cadastroPredial.title: DGT Cadastro Predial (Continente)
cadastroPredial.note: The Gaia municipal bounding box was checked and centroid-clipped against CAOP2025 Vila Nova de Gaia; no Cadastro Predial parcels fell inside the municipality. Local GeoJSON upload remains available for private parcel packs.
